name: Pablo Francisco
bio: Pablo Francisco is an American stand-up comedian known for rapid-fire vocal impressions, sound effects, and movie-trailer parodies, most famously his Little Tortilla Boy bit built around the voice of trailer narrator Don LaFontaine. He appeared as a featured player on MADtv in the 1990s and landed a Comedy Central Presents special in 2000. He toured as part of The Three Amigos with Carlos Mencia and Freddy Soto.

timeline.ev: Begins career doing improv in Tempe, Arizona
Tours as The Three Amigos with Carlos Mencia and Freddy Soto
Releases the Bits and Pieces DVD
